text.title: Methodology Contribution Flow (Open Authorship) Decision Tree
text.summary: Routing tree mapping observable inputs to a rule from `01-core-rules.xml`. MANDATORY for every methodology — even flat ones — per F-066 DoD.

decision-tree.root-question: Is the PR template complete (topic, tier rationale, prior-art, draft AGENTS.md + content, evidence, attribution)?

branch.question: Are there three distinct reviewers covering shape, evidence, duplication?
Is attribution recorded and revenue-share evaluated against the trigger?

text.example: Concrete walk: PR #482 ships template + 3 reviewers (alice/bob/carol) + maintainers updated + CHANGELOG entry + revenue-share enrollment=false (count_so_far=1<5) → accept-and-register.
